C:\MinGW\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\sfml-system.dir/objects.a
C:\MinGW\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\sfml-system.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\sfml-system.dir\objects1.rsp
c:\MinGW\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -shared -o ..\..\..\bin\sfml-system-d-3.dll -Wl,--out-implib,..\..\..\lib\libsfml-system-d.a -Wl,--major-image-version,3,--minor-image-version,1 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\sfml-system.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\sfml-system.dir\linkLibs.rsp
